description: Start enabled PostgreSQL provisioning services; accepts --json
Stop owned containers/networks and remove project generated files; preserve volumes; accepts --json
Show owned provisioning service status; accepts --json
Print derived paths and connection environment without writing files; accepts --json
Inspect Docker, Colima, paths, locks, and ports; accepts --json
Report configured host ports and current listeners; accepts --json
Report owned resources, generated files, configured images, and Docker disk state; accepts --json
Remove current-project owned containers, volumes, networks, and generated files with --owned; accepts --json
Render the compose plan to stdout without writing files; accepts --json
Print the PostgreSQL extension target catalog; accepts --json
Probe local DuckDB and SQLite Forge tool surfaces; accepts --json and optional --surface duckdb|sqlite|all
Read-only check of enabled PostgreSQL provisioning extensions; accepts --json
Create admitted PostgreSQL provisioning extensions and confirm state; accepts --json
Open a session-capable psql inside an owned service (database writes allowed, provisioning state untouched): psql <timescale|search|pgduckdb> [-- <psql-args>]
Validate local script metadata and configuration; accepts --json
